briefing: Boeing surpasses Airbus in deliveries, signaling a significant shift in the aerospace industry.

articles.title: Building trust in the AI era with privacy-led UX
articles.snippet: The practice of privacy-led user experience (UX) is a design philosophy that treats transparency around data collection and usage as an integral part of the customer relationship. An undertapped opportunity in digital marketing, privacy-led UX treats user consent not as a tick-box compliance exercise, but rather as the first overture in an ongoing customer relationship.…
articles.ai_summary: The article discusses privacy-led user experience (UX), emphasizing transparency in data practices as essential for building customer trust. This approach can enhance digital marketing strategies by fostering ongoing relationships with users.
articles.why_it_matters: Enhances user trust and engagement in an era where data privacy is critical.

articles.title: Boeing deliveries soar past Airbus for the first time in years, but this is no time to unbuckle your seat belt
articles.snippet: Supply chain and engineering woes keep the supply of new planes sputtering Boeing has delivered more commercial planes in a quarter than Airbus for the first time in seven years.…
articles.ai_summary: Boeing has outperformed Airbus in commercial plane deliveries for the first time in seven years, despite ongoing supply chain and engineering challenges. This shift indicates a potential recovery in Boeing's operational capabilities.
articles.why_it_matters: Signals a competitive shift in the aerospace industry that could impact market dynamics.

articles.title: AI-powered mainframe exits are a bubble set to pop: Gartner
articles.snippet: Analysts reckon 70 percent of projects will fail, and 75 percent of vendors in the field will go away Most mainframe users who turn to AI for help migrating legacy code to alternative platforms are going to be very disappointed, according to analyst firm Gartner.…
articles.ai_summary: Gartner warns that a significant majority of AI-powered mainframe migration projects are likely to fail, predicting that 70% will not succeed and 75% of vendors may exit the market. This highlights the risks associated with adopting AI in legacy systems.
articles.why_it_matters: Highlights the potential pitfalls of AI integration in traditional systems, urging caution for businesses.

articles.title: Anthropic’s rise is giving some OpenAI investors second thoughts

articles.title: Your AI-Generated Code Isn't Secure - Here's What We Find Every Time
articles.snippet: Independent security firms tested 150+ AI models. 45% of generated code fails basic OWASP checks. Six predictable vulnerabilities appear in nearly every vibe-coded app — and most can be checked in 30 minutes.
articles.ai_summary: A security analysis of over 150 AI-generated code models revealed that 45% failed basic security checks, with common vulnerabilities identified. This raises concerns about the reliability of AI-generated code in applications.
articles.why_it_matters: Underscores the need for improved security measures in AI-generated software to prevent vulnerabilities.
